title: (Sorta) About Me
description: I love tinkering with technology, getting it to shape and form to my will. Just the slightest bit crazy about custom editors like [Emacs](https://www.gnu.org/software/emacs/) and [Neovim](https://neovim.io/) (yes, I like both).
Primarily a Unity and Python developer, although I am comfortable with a reasonable number of other languages and frameworks (see Skills)
